verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We've heard Elijah on the mount Ran from the wrath of Jezebel, But God came down to visit him And caused his heart to swell;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In a wind, earthquake and fire, God came to him by choice, But he bowed his head in reverence To the still small voice.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I thank the Lord for coming today in a still small voice, Raise your hands my brother and sister, Let's stand and rejoice. Overlook the wind, the thunder and fire And wait on the Lord, Let's put our faith in the glorious grace Of His still, small voice.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This world has been conditioned To think the power of the Lord, Only comes through great convictions With miracles galore;

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But in this age of mixed emotions, There's a Word that's being voiced, Not in the miracles, signs and wonders, But in a still small voice.
